visual_findings: The guide-seat comparison is obstructed by a large black and yellow leaf-card mass in the immediate gameplay view.
The river-eye comparison repeats sparse dark crowns and does not establish convincing southern African gorge woodland.
The candidate pass causes the terrain to render as a bright white fallback-like surface, so the comparison is not materially coherent.
A single tree structure analog cannot provide the species, crown, age, density, seasonal, or wind variation required for Batoka Gorge.
The candidate is not an exact approved Batoka Gorge species and has no ecology, guide, art, gameplay, or measured performance approval.
next_asset_requirements: Acquire several rights-cleared southern African gorge woodland and riparian species with exact source and license records.
Require distance-stable leaf materials with correct masked two-sided foliage shading under the recorded capture photometry.
Provide crown, age, density, wind, and seasonal variants so repetition is not visible from the guide seat or river eye.
Place species through source-mask-aware ecology zones with protected guide-seat sightlines and hazard readability.
Pass ecology, guide, art, rights, gameplay, and measured desktop and VR performance review before promotion.
